title: OpenWebUI - Instance Parameters
description: Configuration parameters for deploying OpenWebUI via SlapOS.

port.title: External HTTPS Port
port.description: Port on which HAProxy exposes OpenWebUI (IPv6).

internal-port.title: Internal Port
internal-port.description: Port on which OpenWebUI listens internally (behind HAProxy).

ollama-url.title: Ollama Backend URL
ollama-url.description: URL of an Ollama instance to connect to (e.g. http://localhost:11434).

openai-api-base-url.title: OpenAI-compatible API Base URL
openai-api-base-url.description: Base URL of an OpenAI-compatible API backend.

openai-api-key.title: OpenAI API Key
openai-api-key.description: API key for the OpenAI-compatible backend.

logrotate-num.title: Log Retention (days)
logrotate-num.description: Number of rotated log files to keep.
